message:
🐛 Fix Nightly E2E card showing error during cold loading (#1099)

The card incorrectly coupled demo data status into the hasAnyData check,
causing CardWrapper to show "Refresh Failed" during initial load when the
API hasn't responded yet. Now hasAnyData only checks if guides exist,
matching the pattern used by all other cards. The isDemoData param
already handles the demo badge separately.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -598,7 +598,7 @@ export function NightlyE2EStatus() {
 
   const { showSkeleton } = useCardLoadingState({
     isLoading,
-    hasAnyData: guides.length > 0 && !isDemoFallback,
+    hasAnyData: guides.length > 0,
     isFailed,
     consecutiveFailures,
     isDemoData: isDemoFallback,
